# GitHub Actions Workflows

## Documentation Deployment

### pages-vitepress.yml
- **Technology**: VitePress (VuePress successor)
- **Performance**: 10-50x faster than Honkit
- **Features**: Modern UI, instant search, perfect i18n
- **Build Time**: ~30 seconds
- **Status**: ✅ Production ready

## Key Features

| Feature | Details |
|---------|---------|
| Build Speed | ~30 seconds |
| Bundle Size | ~3 MB |
| Search | Built-in instant search |
| Mobile UX | Excellent responsive design |
| Dark Mode | Native support |
| i18n | Full internationalization |
